Banner.Name: Firas Abdallah
Banner.Title: Software Engineer & CS Educator
Banner.Description: I'm a software engineer specialising in full-stack development and DevOps engineering — building microservices, CI/CD pipelines, and automation tools. I also teach Cambridge IGCSE & A-Level Computer Science, bridging the gap between production engineering and the next generation of developers.
AboutMe.Title: About Me
AboutMe.Paragraphs: I'm a software engineer with hands-on experience shipping full-stack systems and DevOps pipelines — from microservices with Spring Boot and Angular to complete CI/CD infrastructure using Jenkins, ArgoCD, and Kubernetes.

I build real tools: HireFlow AI automates the entire job application pipeline in under 60 seconds — rewriting your CV with ATS-optimised keywords, compiling a PDF, writing a cover letter, and sending the email to HR. I'm also currently building a Tunisian Belote card game in Flutter.
Alongside engineering, I teach Cambridge IGCSE & A-Level Computer Science — mentoring students on real projects, including a Library Management System now actively running at school.
Some of the technologies I've worked with include (but are not limited to):
Experience.Title: Experience

Experience.Jobs.Title: End-of-Studies Intern — Full-Stack & DevOps
Description: Built HiveMind Academy — a full e-learning platform using microservices architecture
Implemented a complete DevOps pipeline: Jenkins, GitLab CI/CD, ArgoCD, Kubernetes
Developed microservices with Spring Boot, Angular, and Python Flask
Integrated Keycloak (SSO/auth), Google Calendar API, and Gemini AI
Managed Infrastructure as Code and container orchestration end-to-end

Experience.Jobs.Title: Full-Stack Developer
Description: Developed a multimedia module and user management system
Built with Spring Boot, Angular, and MySQL
Implemented multimedia upload features and an analytics dashboard
Designed database schema and REST APIs for content management
Delivered responsive frontend with Angular and TypeScript

Experience.Jobs.Title: IoT Developer
Description: Built an autonomous Wi-Fi weather station with IoT environmental sensors
Implemented wireless communication protocols for real-time data transmission
Developed a web-based monitoring dashboard for live sensor data visualisation
Handled full hardware-software integration and testing

Experience.Jobs.Title: Computer Science Teacher
Description: Teaching IGCSE and A-Level (AS & A2) Computer Science — Cambridge International Curriculum
Mentored an A-Level student in building a Python Library Management System, now deployed and actively used at school
Attended the Cambridge IGCSE & O Level CS Marking Workshop (0478/0984) — Oct–Nov 2025
Certified by Anthropic in AI Fluency for Educators

FeatureProjects.Title: My Projects
FeatureProjects.Label: Highlighted Project

FeatureProjects.Projects.Title: HireFlow AI
FeatureProjects.Projects.Description: A desktop automation app that handles the entire job application pipeline in under 60 seconds. Paste a job description and the AI rewrites your LaTeX CV with ATS-optimized keywords, auto-detects the language (French JD → French CV), compiles a clean PDF, writes a human-sounding cover letter, and sends the email to HR — fully automated.

FeatureProjects.Projects.Title: HiveMind Academy
FeatureProjects.Projects.Description: A comprehensive e-learning microservices platform with a complete DevOps pipeline. Features SSO authentication with Keycloak, Google Calendar integration, Gemini AI, and full container orchestration with automated deployment via ArgoCD and Kubernetes.

FeatureProjects.Projects.Title: EldSync
FeatureProjects.Projects.Description: An elder care web application with comprehensive user management, appointment scheduling, health monitoring, and secure data handling via Spring Security. Built with a modern responsive frontend.

OtherProjects.Title: More Projects

OtherProjects.Projects.Title: Belote Tunisie
OtherProjects.Projects.Description: A full Tunisian Belote card game built with Flutter, implementing the complete Tunisian ruleset with AI opponents, score tracking, and smooth card animations.

OtherProjects.Projects.Title: Angular Form Builder
OtherProjects.Projects.Description: A dynamic form builder with drag-and-drop fields, custom validation, data export (CSV/JSON), and import functionality — built entirely in Angular.

OtherProjects.Projects.Title: Library Management System
OtherProjects.Projects.Description: Python desktop app co-built with an A-Level student. Currently deployed and actively used at CIS International School of Tunis for managing the school library.

OtherProjects.Projects.Title: QuantStats Platform
OtherProjects.Projects.Description: Football analytics and statistics platform with real-time data processing, interactive dashboards, and advanced match analysis.

OtherProjects.Projects.Title: EcoCycle
OtherProjects.Projects.Description: Recycling management platform available as both a desktop app (JavaFX) and a web app (Symfony). Features waste tracking and recycling centre management.

OtherProjects.Projects.Title: IoT Weather Station
OtherProjects.Projects.Description: Autonomous Wi-Fi weather station with multiple environmental sensors, real-time wireless data transmission, and a web-based monitoring dashboard.

OtherProjects.Projects.Title: Security Assessment
OtherProjects.Projects.Description: Penetration testing project using Kali Linux and Metasploit to simulate attacks before and after deploying a pfSense firewall — demonstrating measurable network security improvement.

OtherProjects.Projects.Title: DevOps Pipeline Demo
OtherProjects.Projects.Description: Complete CI/CD pipeline with automated testing, building, and deployment to Kubernetes using Jenkins, GitLab CI, ArgoCD, and Terraform.

Contact.Title: Say Hi!
Contact.Content: I'm open to software engineering roles, freelance projects, and technical collaborations. If you want to discuss opportunities or just talk tech, write to me and I'll get back to you as soon as I see your message.
